title: KOHLBURG Security Chain Lock Sold Secure Gold - 4ft / 120cm Extra-Long Bicycle Lock - high Security Standard - Heavy Duty Lock 0.33" Strong - Secure Bike Chain Lock for e-Bike Bicycle Motorbike
features: SECURITY FIRST, NO EXCUSE GIMMICKS – This chain lock of type Helsinki is designed to protect high-quality bikes and motorbikes - no more and no less. Hence, this lock is no lifestyle accessory with exciting gimmicks. We prioritize security by using an especially strong Titanium steel and a particularly safe cylinder that matches car security standards. We combine years of experience in the field of bike security with our high security standards. For details, please see below.

SOLID STEEL INSTEAD OF LIGHT STEEL – In contrast to many other chain locks who are advertised as lightweight, we do not use light steel with reduced safety. We believe there is simply no shortcut for security. That is why our lock is made of solid hardened steel and, thus, is especially secure against bolt cutters & metal saws. The price of this high anti-theft focus is a heavy lock weight of 5.5 lbs. Greatly suited for motorcycle scooter moped ebike pedelec electric bike & bike trailer.

EXTRA-LONG LOCK – The longer the lock, the more convenient and secure the bicycle can be locked. This bike chain lock has a spacious length of 4 feet / 47 inch / 120 cm. This length is important to securely lock both your bike frame AND the front wheel to a fixed object. Or to secure several bikes at once.

HIGH SECURITY CHAIN – The lock chain provides a high level of security against bolt cutters & hacksaws due to the 0.33" / 8.3 mm strong 4-edge links. Additionally, the lockhead offers an anti-lock-picking cylinder. To also protect your bike’s varnish, the chain is coated with a soft & robust sleeve. The lock comes with 4 keys.

BETTER MASSIVE THAN SORRY – The very long & massive lock offers a convenient balance between security and weight. On the one hand, locks with chain diameter of 0.25" or less are much lighter, but hardly offer a reliable protection. On the other hand, this chain lock is highly secure, but please consider the rather high weight of 5.5 lbs, and only buy this lock if the weight is acceptable for you. Please keep in mind, as we like to say: Better massive than sorry.
description: Product Description Long and massive. The security chain lock of type Helsinki offers strong Sold Secure security standards with a convenient length. And that’s it. Security comes first This lock offers security for your bike, without distracting you with a fancy design or gimmicks. We have assembled only the most secure components in this security chain lock. For example, the lock features a chain with 4-edge links, which protect against bolt cutters because of the larger diameter length. Hardened steel - a must-have! The hardness of your chain lock is crucial when it comes to resist bolt cutters and metal saws. Thus, when it comes to the steel in your lock, we make no compromises. For example, using very lightweight steel would easily reduce the weight of this lock by 1.5 lbs / 700 grams, but unfortunately it would also lower the protection level to a degree that we could not recommend it for high-quality bikes and motorbikes. Consequently, for our locks, we choose only solid special steel that was additionally hardened at very high temperatures. This crucial security feature raises the chain lock weight to considerable 5.5 lbs / 2.5 kilo. Nevertheless, as we like to say: better massive than sorry. Flexible locking thanks to extra-long chain When locking your bike, length naturally plays a decisive role. The longer the lock, the more securely it can be locked to a fixed object - ideally by locking both the bike frame AND the wheels. This KOHLBURG lock has an extra-long 4 feet chain, which allows flexible locking without much effort, even to particularly wide objects such as street lamps or even trees. No thieve in the world can break this lock! Sorry, unfortunately, that is not true. And we are honest with you as we want you to correctly evaluate the risk for your lovely bike to take the best measures. Of course, other lock producers promise unbreakable protection, but this is simply not possible for any bicycle lock - no matter how big (just think of a thief with an angle grinder and enough time to spare). What we offer to you is the highest possible security for a lock that can be conveniently carried with your bike. To make a long story short: There is no better way to keep your bike in your hands than with this security chain lock. The advantages of the KOHLBURG chain lock type Helsinki at a glance: massive hardened special Titanium steel - important against bolt cutters secure lock cylinder with car security standard - protection against lock-picking extra-long 4 feet / 47 inch / 120 cm length - for easy locking of frame & front wheel chain with 0.33" / 8.3 mm strong 4-edge links - highest security level against bolt cutters & hacksaws a soft and robust chain sleeve covers the chain to protect your bike’s varnish lock weight: 5.5 lbs / 2500 grams - please only buy this lock if this weight is acceptable to you diameter of the lock head (widest part of the lock): 1.6" / 4 cm 4 keys included for high-quality bicycles, e-bikes & motorbikes
